title: King and Queen Fall Back
description: On pages 0–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Kaido, Unknown person #4, Zoro as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Really the world you wanted? Worororo!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this point, it doesn't matter what you do... I owe you my life.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And I'll make sure to never lose...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Until you're King of the Pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: until the day I beat him to become the greatest swordsman...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If this is what it takes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: battle outside the right brain tower...
